_comment: Documentation-only fields such as _comment and _param_help are ignored by the code. They are here to explain what each config parameter controls.

_param_help.n_items: Number of key-value records generated for the local B+ tree demo.
_param_help.key_max: Maximum possible generated key. Together with n_items, this controls key density and duplicate frequency.
_param_help.allow_duplicates: If true, multiple records may share the same key.
_param_help.seed: Random seed used for data generation. Point and range queries reuse this seed with small offsets so runs are reproducible.
_param_help.tree_order: B+ tree order / fanout setting. Larger values usually reduce tree height and increase node capacity.
_param_help.n_point_queries: Number of exact-key lookup queries to benchmark.
_param_help.n_range_queries: Number of key-range queries to benchmark.
_param_help.range_low_min: Smallest lower bound that can be generated for a range query.
_param_help.range_low_max: Largest lower bound that can be generated for a range query.
_param_help.range_max_width: Maximum width of a generated key-range query.

_param_help.n_items: Number of rectangles generated for the local R-tree demo.
_param_help.space_width: Width of the 2D synthetic space in which rectangles are generated.
_param_help.space_height: Height of the 2D synthetic space in which rectangles are generated.
_param_help.max_rect_width: Maximum rectangle width during data generation.
_param_help.max_rect_height: Maximum rectangle height during data generation.
_param_help.seed: Random seed for rectangle generation and query sampling.
_param_help.max_entries: Maximum number of entries allowed in an R-tree node before a split.
_param_help.n_point_queries: Number of point-location queries, where a point is tested against stored rectangles.
_param_help.n_queries: Number of rectangle intersection queries to benchmark.
_param_help.max_query_width: Maximum width of a generated query rectangle.
_param_help.max_query_height: Maximum height of a generated query rectangle.

_param_help.n_items: Number of 2D points generated for the local KD-tree demo.
_param_help.space_width: Width of the 2D synthetic point space.
_param_help.space_height: Height of the 2D synthetic point space.
_param_help.seed: Random seed for point generation and query sampling.
_param_help.n_point_queries: Number of exact point lookup queries.
_param_help.max_query_width: Maximum width of a generated rectangle range query.
_param_help.max_query_height: Maximum height of a generated rectangle range query.

_param_help.n_items: Number of 2D points generated for the local Quadtree demo.
_param_help.space_width: Width of the 2D synthetic point space.
_param_help.space_height: Height of the 2D synthetic point space.
_param_help.seed: Random seed for point generation and query sampling.
_param_help.n_point_queries: Number of exact point lookup queries.
_param_help.max_query_width: Maximum width of a generated rectangle range query.
_param_help.max_query_height: Maximum height of a generated rectangle range query.
_param_help.bucket_capacity: Maximum number of points stored in a quadtree leaf before subdivision.
_param_help.max_depth: Maximum allowed quadtree depth. Prevents endless subdivision when data is dense.

_param_help.n_items: Number of records used in the B+ tree order comparison sweep.
_param_help.allow_duplicates: If true, duplicate keys may appear in the comparison dataset.
_param_help.seed: Random seed for the comparison dataset and queries.
_param_help.orders: List of B+ tree order values to compare in one benchmark sweep.
_param_help.n_queries: Number of exact-key point queries used for the comparison.

_param_help.n_items: Number of rectangles used in the R-tree capacity comparison sweep.
_param_help.seed: Random seed for dataset and query generation.
_param_help.capacities: List of max_entries values to compare for R-tree node capacity.
_param_help.n_queries: Number of rectangle intersection queries used for the comparison.
_param_help.max_query_width: Maximum width of a generated query rectangle.
_param_help.max_query_height: Maximum height of a generated query rectangle.
